headline: GILD Stock Jumps After Winning Accelerated FDA Approval For HDV Treatment
summary: U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) approved Hepcludex (bulevirtide-gmod) injection to treat chronic hepatitis delta virus.

raw.headline: GILD Stock Jumps After Winning Accelerated FDA Approval For HDV Treatment
raw.summary: U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) approved Hepcludex (bulevirtide-gmod) injection to treat chronic hepatitis delta virus.

headline: FDA Grants Accelerated Approval to Gilead’s Hepcludex® (bulevirtide-gmod), the First and Only Approved Treatment for Chronic Hepatitis Delta Virus (HDV)
summary: FOSTER CITY, Calif., May 22, 2026--Gilead Sciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: GILD) today announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has granted accelerated approval for Hepcludex® (bulevirtide-gmod) 8.5 mg for the treatment of adults living with chronic hepatitis delta virus (HDV) infection, making it the first and only approved treatment for HDV in the United States.

headline: Gilead Receives CHMP Positive Opinion for Trodelvy® in First-Line Metastatic Triple-Negative Breast Cancer for Patients Not Candidates for PD-(L)1 Inhibitors
summary: FOSTER CITY, Calif., May 22, 2026--Gilead Sciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: GILD) today announced that the Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) of the European Medicines Agency (EMA) has adopted a positive opinion, recommending the marketing authorization of Trodelvy® (sacituzumab govitecan-hziy) as a monotherapy for the treatment of adult patients with unresectable locally advanced or metastatic triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC) who have not received prior systemic therapy for metasta

headline: Gilead Sciences completes Tubulis acquisition for $5bn
summary: Gilead acquired all outstanding equity of Tubulis for $3.15bn upfront, plus up to $1.85bn in milestone payments.
